transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Hi. Before we go further I'll need to know your work situation and when you're looking to move.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: I’m a Product Manager, and my partner Sophie works in marketing. We’re looking to move next month. When would be a good time to view the flat?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Thanks for the info. If you want to view the flat, please confirm a specific day and time that suits you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: Would Saturday afternoon work for a viewing? Let me know what time suits you best.

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: What time on Saturday afternoon were you thinking? Also, please confirm your exact move-in date.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: Saturday around 2pm would work well. We’re aiming to move in from the start of next month. Does that time suit you?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Yes, that works. You can reach me on 07123456789 Saturday at 2pm for the viewing.
